Why Families Choose Us

Discover what makes Mighty Smiles different from every other dental office.

Gentle Care

We work exclusively with kids, so we know how to make every visit comfortable — even for the most anxious children.

Solea Laser

Often no needles, no drills. Our laser technology means less anxiety and more comfort for your child.

Positive Experiences

It's not a playdate, but we hope it feels like one. Fun, friendly, and designed to make kids smile.

Special Needs

Customized care for children with developmental and sensory accommodations. Every child deserves great dental care.

Insurance Friendly

We accept most major insurance plans. Call us to verify your coverage before your visit.

Emergency Dental

When it matters most, you don't have to wait. Call us for same-day emergency appointments.

Meet Your Kids' Dentists

Giving kids and parents exactly what they need.

Dr. Amanda Campbell

General Dentist

Known for her patience and warmth, Dr. Campbell connects with even the most anxious children. She has a way of turning tears into giggles and making every child feel safe.

Parents describe her as someone who goes above and beyond, taking time to answer every question and explain every step.

"An unexpected miracle in our family's life." — Judith C.

Dr. Vanna Truong

General Dentist

Professional, kind, and genuinely fun. Dr. Truong makes kids feel comfortable from the moment they walk in, and keeps families coming back visit after visit.

Her approach is calm, confident, and always centered on making sure both child and parent feel informed and at ease.

"My son actually asks to go back." — Leslie C.M.

Hear From Real Parents

Real reviews from families in our community.

Since I got in I felt very welcomed. Dr. Amanda was very caring about my girl's pain and made sure all my questions were answered. I believe God sent me there.

Best dental office my son has ever been to. Dr. Vanna was so professional, kind and fun. She made my son feel comfortable and happy. They truly care.

Our Children's Dental Services

From first checkups to complex care, always with gentleness.

Solea Laser

Precise, comfortable laser dentistry. Often no needles and no drills needed.

Checkups & Cleanings

Regular cleanings, sealants, fluoride treatments, and digital X-rays.

Restorative

Fillings, crowns, space maintainers, and emergency care for little teeth.

Sedation

Nitrous oxide and general anesthesia for children who need extra comfort.

Special Needs

Customized care for children with developmental and sensory accommodations.

Hospital Dentistry

Safe outpatient treatment under general anesthesia when needed.
